# Fische & mehr

> A small neighbourhood fishmonger and import shop in Vienna's 2nd district
> (Glockengasse 22, 1020 Vienna, near Taborstraße). Its speciality is LIVE fish,
> kept in tanks and freshly slaughtered, cleaned and filleted to order. Alongside
> live and day-fresh fish it sells specialties imported from Uzbekistan and the
> wider Central Asian region: dried fruit, nuts, natural honey, spices, pickles
> and spirits. Not a supermarket, not e-commerce — a small, personal shop. No
> online prices or checkout; fish is daily produce and prices follow the market
> and season.

## Facts
- Address: Glockengasse 22, 1020 Vienna, Austria (near Taborstraße station)
- Phone: 0676 844293203 (also WhatsApp)
- E-mail: angelina.refaelov@chello.at
- Opening hours: Monday–Friday 08:30–17:30; Saturday & Sunday closed
- Languages served: German (primary), English, Russian, Hebrew
- Speciality: live fish, freshly slaughtered to order (kosher — carp, silver carp,
  trout; also fresh mackerel, sea bass, sea bream, salmon). All fish is kosher.
- Categories: fresh & live fish, smoked fish, caviar, dried fruit, nuts, natural
  honey, spices, pickled vegetables, sweets, spirits
- Kosher: fish is kosher (certifying authority to be confirmed)
- Ordering: no online payment/checkout. Smoked-fish platters can be pre-ordered via the
  site's order form, which emails the request to the shop for confirmation.

## Pages
- Home: /de, /en, /ru, /he — overview, trust signals, product gallery, "why us"
- Sortiment (range): /{locale}/sortiment — full product gallery, categories, fish-platter builder
- Über uns (about): /{locale}/ueber-uns — story, kosher info, origin, values
- Kontakt (contact): /{locale}/kontakt — map, hours, contact form, FAQ
- Impressum: /{locale}/impressum — legal disclosure (Austria)
- Datenschutz: /{locale}/datenschutz — privacy policy (GDPR)

## Notes for automated agents
- Full sitemap: /sitemap.xml
